entities.name: mavacamten
entities.context: Mavacamten (MYK-461, Camzyos) is a first-in-class selective cardiac myosin inhibitor. SMILES: CC(C1=CC=CC=C1)NC(=O)N1CCC(CC1)OC1=NC=NC(=C1)NCC1=CC=CC=C1

entities.name: beta-cardiac myosin heavy chain
entities.context: Target: Beta-cardiac myosin heavy chain (MYH7, UniProt: P12883)

entities.name: MYH7
entities.context: beta-cardiac myosin (MYH7)

entities.name: MYBPC3
entities.context: mutations in MYH7 or MYBPC3 cause excessive cross-bridge formation

entities.name: MYH1
entities.context: >100-fold selective for cardiac myosin over fast skeletal myosin (MYH1)

entities.name: myosin motor domain
entities.context: Binding site: Allosteric site on the myosin motor domain

entities.name: CYP2C19
entities.context: Mavacamten is primarily metabolized by CYP2C19 and CYP3A4

entities.name: CYP3A4
entities.context: primarily metabolized by CYP2C19 and CYP3A4

entities.name: cardiac myosin ATPase inhibition via super-relaxed state stabilization
entities.context: selectively inhibits cardiac myosin ATPase by stabilizing an auto-inhibited (super-relaxed) state of beta-cardiac myosin (MYH7)

entities.name: sarcomere

attributes.description: fundamental contractile unit of cardiac muscle

entities.context: Mavacamten acts on the sarcomere — the fundamental contractile unit of cardiac muscle

entities.name: obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy
entities.context: FDA approved April 28, 2022 for symptomatic obstructive HCM (NYHA class II-III)

entities.name: left ventricular outflow tract obstruction
entities.context: dynamic left ventricular outflow tract (LVOT) obstruction

entities.name: heart failure with reduced ejection fraction
entities.context: Black box warning: Risk of heart failure due to systolic dysfunction

entities.context: VALOR-HCM (NCT04349072): Phase III, mavacamten in patients eligible for septal reduction therapy
